name: Nutrafol
description: Premium hair growth supplement backed by clinical studies
summary: If you can afford $88/month and want the most clinically-studied hair supplement on the market, Nutrafol is the gold standard.

name: Rogaine Minoxidil 5%
description: The FDA-approved topical treatment that actually works
summary: Rogaine is the only FDA-approved topical for hair regrowth. Not glamorous but it works, and generic versions make it affordable.

name: Vegamour GRO Serum
description: Plant-based TikTok favorite for thicker hair
summary: If you want a clean, vegan alternative to chemicals, Vegamour is the TikTok darling with decent results to back the hype.

name: The Ordinary Hair Serum
description: Budget peptide serum from the skincare brand everyone trusts
summary: At $18 this is the cheapest serious hair growth serum. The Ordinary brought their skincare philosophy to haircare.

name: Biotin 10000mcg
description: Classic affordable vitamin for hair, skin, and nails
summary: Biotin is the cheapest entry point. Works best if you are actually deficient, which many people are without knowing.

name: Rosemary Oil
description: The TikTok natural remedy that studies say rivals minoxidil
summary: Studies show rosemary oil can match minoxidil for hair growth. At $10 a bottle with zero side effects, best natural option.
